title: Content Module M1 - Headline, Copy, Form, and Button

fields.label: Set as H1 Tag
fields.name: m1_intro_use_h1
fields.instructions: An h1 tag should only be used once on a page. This is to define the title of the page.

sub_fields.message: Note: Be sure to set the corresponding screen size "Number of Columns..." fields to blank or to "auto" if setting a custom width.

sub_fields.name: m1_head_sz
sub_fields.instructions: The Headline will be displayed in H2 tag (Header 2) for SEO purposes , but you can override the text size for design purposes.

sub_fields.instructions: Don't "Lazy Load" images visible on initial page load.

fields.name: m1_clmn_num
fields.instructions: The default is 1

fields.instructions: The default is Desktop value

fields.name: m1_clmn_num_mob
fields.instructions: The default is 1

fields.instructions: Set to desktop width by default

fields.name: m1_clmn_gutter_mob

fields.name: m1_clmn_size
fields.instructions: Default sizing for modules 2x2 is equal width. Choose a sizing alternative below.

title: Content Module M2 - Slideshow or Grid

fields.label: Enter unique name for sliding grid
fields.name: m2_grid_slider_name

fields.label: Post Type to Select From
fields.name: m2_pageslides_posttype
fields.instructions: "post" will be selected if left blank

fields.label: Number of Posts to Display
fields.name: m2_pageslides_cnt
fields.instructions: Enter -1 to activate pagination

fields.label: Paginate with Limited Posts per Page
fields.name: m2_pageslides_post_lmt

fields.label: Page Selector
fields.name: m2_pageslides
fields.instructions: Slides will be generated from default content, unless the Slide fields are populated within the edit screen of the specific page.

sub_fields.label: Video ID
sub_fields.name: m2_vidid
sub_fields.instructions:
Paste the ID of a video from either YouTube or Vimeo only.

Be sure to adjust video contrast in brightness in an editing app, to maintain optimal text readability.

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: m2_img
sub_fields.instructions: Be sure to adjust image contrast in brightness in an editing app, to maintain optimal text readability.

sub_fields.label: Fit Image
sub_fields.name: m2_fitimg
sub_fields.instructions: Will show image without cropping to fill space.

sub_fields.label: Lazy Load Image
sub_fields.name: m2_lazy
sub_fields.instructions: Don't "Lazy Load" the first slide of an slider that is visible on initial page load.
